text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 55 

RX_ORGN_CD 

LABEL: Prescription Origination Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the prescription was transmitted as an electronic prescription, by 
phone, by fax, or as a written paper copy. 

SHORT NAME: RX_ORGN_CD 

LONG NAME: RX_ORGN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Null = Unknown 
0 = Not specified 
1 = Written 
2 =
